name: io.github.mobileshop9991-star/clipwise-mcp
title: Clipwise
description: AI tools for short-form video creators (TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, Facebook Reels). Three tools: service info, use-case scenarios for creators and agencies, and viral TikTok trend search across 20+ countries.

environmentVariables.name: CLIPWISE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Required only for clipwise_search_trends. Get a free key at https://tryclipwise.com/en/dashboard/account
